wordplay_note: Willing but unable to save the marriage or business
card_description: Susan Faine (meaning "Faine = glad/willing") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *In Milton Lumky Territory*. Jim's older wife and former teacher whose past catches up with them. Name note: Willing but unable to save the marriage or business. Age difference and class anxiety in 1950s small-town America. First appears in *In Milton Lumky Territory*.

reference.brief: Jim's older wife and former teacher whose past catches up with them
reference.significance: Age difference and class anxiety in 1950s small-town America
